summary: DLR Redesign testing completed. Backend APIs fully verified (100% pass). Frontend UI verified via screenshots showing Labour Day Rates section in Work Order dialog and DLR panel structure.
critical_code_review_comments: DLRPanel.jsx correctly implements 3 FIXED rows (Skilled, Semi-Skilled, Unskilled) with proper data-testid attributes
Work Order dialog has Labour Day Rates section in teal box with 3 input fields
Backend correctly stores and returns labour_rates field in work orders
DLR cost calculation formula verified: count × day_value × rate_per_day
seed_data_creation: None - used existing project proj_12f23331b542 with work order wo_31d466c8 (labour_rates: skilled=900, semi_skilled=650, unskilled=450)
context_for_next_testing_agent: DLR Redesign fully tested. Key changes: 1) Work Order now has labour_rates field with 3 rates (skilled, semi_skilled, unskilled), 2) DLR dialog shows 3 FIXED rows instead of dynamic add/remove, 3) Rate/Day is pre-filled from work order's labour_rates and shown as read-only text, 4) DLR entries list shows table format with Type, Workers, Day, Rate/Day, Total columns.

GET /api/projects/{project_id}/work-orde.details: Returns labour_rates field with skilled=900, semi_skilled=650, unskilled=450
Returns list of work orders with labour_rates field

POST /api/projects/{project_id}/work-ord.details: Creates DLR with 3 fixed entry types (skilled, semi_skilled, unskilled)

GET /api/projects/{project_id}/work-orde.details: Returns DLR entries with entries array containing type, count, day_value, rate_per_day, total_cost

Work Order Edit Dialog - Labour Day Rate.details: Teal box with 'Labour Day Rates (INR) - Used for DLR' label and 3 input fields (Skilled, Semi-Skilled, Unskilled) with data-testid attributes

DLR Panel in Work Order Detail.details: DLR tab visible in work order detail view with DLRPanel component

DLR Panel data-testid attributes.details: dlr-panel, dlr-add-btn, dlr-entry-*, dlr-row-skilled, dlr-row-semi_skilled, dlr-row-unskilled, dlr-count-*, dlr-day-*, dlr-form-total

Work Order list view.details: Shows work orders with contractor name, type, value, and action buttons

verified_features.backend_labour_rates_storage: Work order accepts and stores labour_rates field ({skilled, semi_skilled, unskilled})
verified_features.backend_labour_rates_retrieval: GET work-orders returns labour_rates in response
verified_features.frontend_wo_labour_rates_section: Work Order create/edit dialog has 'Labour Day Rates' section with 3 fields in teal box
verified_features.frontend_dlr_fixed_rows: DLR dialog shows 3 FIXED rows in table format (Skilled, Semi-Skilled, Unskilled)
verified_features.frontend_dlr_prefilled_rates: DLR dialog pre-fills Rate/Day from work order's labour_rates
verified_features.frontend_dlr_calculations: DLR dialog calculates row totals and grand total correctly
